title: Expand self-host C codegen until examples run without placeholder behavior
goal: Remove placeholder C emission paths from selfhost/codegen_c.tya by implementing real executable output for the next missing supported node family.
context: Use the next unsupported example or feature from SELFHOST_WORK.md.
Generated C should be readable, deterministic, and compatible with runtime/tya_runtime.c.
Avoid broad rewrites; implement one coherent codegen feature slice.
steps: Find the placeholder or skipped path that blocks the next example.
Implement real generated C for that node family.
Add or extend a stage pipeline fixture proving the generated C compiles and runs.
Remove or narrow the corresponding placeholder behavior.
done_when: At least one placeholder codegen path is replaced with executable generated C.
A previously blocked example or fixture runs through the self-host pipeline.
SELFHOST_WORK.md records the next codegen blocker.
